arts.ttl: Three observations from Real Madrid’s 3-0 win over Leganes
arts.sum: Real Madrid started this game with a team that looked like they were playing in a 4-2-3-1 in possession with Eduardo Camavinga and Dani Ceballos acting as the double pivot, setting Jude Bellingham free to attack at will. He may not be the star man that you’re used to seeing at clubs like Real Madrid, but he does help with structure and build-up a lot more than you’d expect.

arts.ttl: ‘What a player’ – Real Madrid legend hails Arda Güler

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti explains Kylian Mbappe position switch with Vinicius Junior in easy Real Madrid win
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti opened up on the tactical tweak behind Real Madrid's 3-0 victory over Leganes.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Leganes 0 - 3 Real Madrid, Post-game, La Liga 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani, Matt Wiltse, and Mehedi Hassan discuss: Kiyan, Matt, and Mehedi break down the win, look ahead to Anfield, and discuss Florentino’s quotes this morning

arts.ttl: Real Madrid triumph 3-0 over Leganes with Mbappe & Bellingham on the scoresheet
arts.sum: Real Madrid recorded a 3-0 win over Leganes on Sunday night to edge closer to league leaders Barcelona at the top of the table.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe and Jude Bellingham help Real Madrid stay on Barcelona’s heels
arts.sum: Los Blancos, sitting in second, capitalised on leaders Barcelona’s draw to Celta Vigo on Saturday to move four points behind with a game in hand.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti explains Fran García starting over Ferland Mendy for Real Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has provided an insight into his decision to afford a starting berth to Fran García over Ferland Mendy on Sunday. Real, of course, are…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid beats Leganés thanks to a fine-tuned BMV
arts.sum: He set Madrid up in Butarque with four midfielders without the ball and a 4-2-3-1 in attack, with Ceballos at the base alongside Camavinga, Arda on the right and Mbappé on the left. Altimira wanted to come out on the ball, Camavinga pressed, Bellingham stole, Vinicius collected and delivered the goal to Mbappé, who came from the left.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti confirms key starter to return at Liverpool
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti has offered a key update ahead of Real Madrid’s UEFA Champions League trip to Liverpool. The defending champions take on Arne Slot’s Premier League leaders in a mouth watering clash on November 27 at Anfield. Los Blancos returned to La Liga action this weekend with a dominant 3-0 win away at Leganes which […] The post Carlo Ancelotti confirms key starter to return at Liverpool appeared first on Football España.
